housing.title: Real Estate
housing.desc: New home prices in 70 cities have fallen consecutively; developer defaults are expanding.

debt.title: Local Gov Debt
debt.desc: LGFV bond spreads approach 300bp; off-balance defaults are rising.

bank.title: Banking System
bank.desc: NIM compressed to 1.54%; special-mention loans are rising.

fx.title: FX & Capital
fx.desc: RMB under pressure; northbound funds have flowed out continuously.

real.title: Real Economy & Jobs
real.desc: Youth unemployment remains high; PPI turned positive but consumption is weak.

market.title: Capital Market
market.desc: A-share turnover has shrunk; IPO withdrawal rates are rising.
